info.title: Embark API (Shared)
info.description: The API entrypoint for all shared endpoints.

get.description: Returns the current profile connected to the system. Useful to check if the token work (and get the embark ID).

x-embark-telemetry-client-platform.name: x-embark-telemetry-client-platform
x-embark-telemetry-client-platform.description: The platform of the client (eg: Steam, Xbox or PlayStation). This information is used for telemetry and to know which third party service the user is using.

countryCode.description: The country code of the profile (ex: FR, EN, US...)

createdAt.description: The date and time when the profile was created

dateOfBirth.description: The date of birth entered by the user

displayName.description: The display name of the profile

discriminator.description: The discriminator to know which type of display name is used, generated by the backend.

name.description: The name entered by the user.

displayNameCooldownEndsAt.description: The date when the display name cooldown ends. It mean that the user can change his display name again after this date.

email.description: The email address of the profile

emailVerified.description: Whether the email address of the profile is verified or not

emailVerifiedAt.description: The date and time when the email address of the profile was verified

isSpender.description: Whether the profile spent money or not

tenancyUserId.description: The tenancy user ID of the profile

thirdPartyLastSeenAccountName.description: The last seen account name of the profile on third party services (eg: Steam, Xbox or PlayStation).

thirdPartyUserId.description: The third party user ID of the profile (eg: Steam, Xbox or PlayStation).

tos_version_seen.description: The latest version of the terms of service seen by the user. The backend can use this information to know if the user need to see the new version of the terms of service or not.

voiceChatModerationConsent.description: Whether the profile has given consent for voice chat moderation or not (not used any more)

403.description: A Bad manifest id was provided.
